faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Delhi Global Institute of Technology for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Delhi Global Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate should have passed in Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the following subjects Chemistry/ Bio-Technology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject taken together with above mentioned percentage for General category and 40% in case of reserved category in 10+2 from a recognised Board/University. Candidate who have passed Diploma (in Engineering and Technology) with at least 45% marks in case of General category and 40% in case of reserved category are also eligible to apply. Candidate who has passed Physics, chemistry and Mathematics in his/ her Diploma Course, then his/ her Diploma is equivalent to 10+2 (Non-Medical).
After 10th Diploma Candidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination from a recognised board.

faqs.question: Does Delhi Global Institute of Technology has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Delhi Global Institute of Technology has been rated 4.5 for faculty as per reviews by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: How is the infrastructure at Delhi Global Institute of Technology? What are the facilities available for students?
faqs.answer: Delhi Global Institute of Technology has been rated 4.8 on Infrastructure parameter. Delhi Global Institute of Technology has also been rated 3.8 for Campuslife.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Delhi Global Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Delhi Global Institute of Technology has been rated 4 on placements.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Delhi Global Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: About 78% of the students from our course got placed. In every semester, we pay Rs. 20,000 with a discount of Rs. 1,000. L&T company visited our college to hire students from our course. Students who score about 75% in academics get an internship. The highest salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 18,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities like free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a good library. There is a playground on which we play cricket.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am somewhat satisfied with the faculty. It provided an average placements in the year 2019.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of the students in our course got placed in the previous year. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Hindustan Construction Company, Unitech, etc., visit our campus for placements. Top roles, like site engineer, quality assurance engineer, supervisor, etc., are offered to the students. The highest salary package offered in our course is 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 1.8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.2 LPA. About 60% of the students got an internship in companies like L&T, DLF, Unitech, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college experience because it's not always about infrastructure, but the VIBE.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70-80% of students were present in the course. As everyone knows, packages are based on knowledge and skills, but the package ranged from 3 LPA to 11 LPA. Wipro and TCS were the top recruiting companies. Almost 20-30% of students did their internships independently, but the college also provided company drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is well-maintained, and faculty members are proficient in their work. The college has separate grounds, a canteen, parking, a tennis court, and almost everything one could need. Most importantly, it is very close to nature, surrounded by lush greenery.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and teaching staff.

review_content.Placements: Internships are in SAP, Accenture, Birla sun life and so on. The highest package 3 lakh and the lowest is 50000. Top roles offered is HR manager in MNCs.
review_content.Infrastructure: AC rooms, Wi-Fi labs, purifier water. Library and also park facilities for hostel student Every room has fan. Due to covid 19 it's sanitized daily. Rooms are clean with peaceful surroundings. Facilities are too good and also helping in nature.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very good and also cooperative. Teaching staff are fine. With studies they also give general knowledge to us. Teachers give us daily task to student related to todays situation.

These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inDelhi Global Institute of Technology, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include JEE Main, HSTES, and CBSE 10th, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. description: Delhi Global Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Delhi Global Institute of Technology can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Delhi Global Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff was 1336705 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 1336705.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.
In this section, students can find the Delhi Global Institute of Technology B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025, as well as the cutoff for other courses and previous years, ie, 2024 and 2023.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Delhi Global Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities like free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a good library. There is a playground on which we play cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I am somewhat satisfied with the faculty. It provided an average placements in the year 2019.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus for students. Labs are good, and it has useful instruments, apparatus and machines. Classrooms are good and huge with natural ventilation. The library has more than 10,000 books in engineering specialisation. The college provides large hostels, but mess food and canteen is not available. Medical facilities are good with a first aid kit along with the medical room. Cricket and basketball games are mostly conducted in a week at large grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college experience because it's not always about infrastructure, but the VIBE.
reviews.review_text: Everything is well-maintained, and faculty members are proficient in their work. The college has separate grounds, a canteen, parking, a tennis court, and almost everything one could need. Most importantly, it is very close to nature, surrounded by lush greenery.

reviews_list.review_title: Awesome and it's feels good in college .

review_content.Placements: The companies that visit primarily come from sectors like IT finance and manufacturing offering roles that cater to a broad range of students Skills and interests. While most students receive average starting packages a few high paying roles are offered each year to top-performing candidates.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is well stocked with both physical and digital resources, and it offers a quiet space for studying. Wi-Fi is available across campus, though connectivity can be consistent at times. Hostel rooms are modestly furnished and clean, though space can feel limited, and mess food could offer more variety.

reviews_list.review_title: If you join my college, it will be good for your future .

The library is good with more than ten thousand books. The hostel is well-maintained. Quality of food is better. Better maintenance of the hostel.

In our college, a playground is available, and the food is very tasty. In my college hostel, snacks are also provided in the evening. Only in my hostel, good drinking water is provided, along with a good warden and gym equipment, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Can Sri Venkateswara Institute of Technology be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Sri Venkateswara Institute of Technology are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Sri Venkateswara Institute of Technology has a rating of 2.5 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 2.5, 2, 2.8 and 2.8 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Disappointing teaching quality and immature students.

content.Placements: Only 20 students were placed in our college. The highest package offered was 7 LPA and the lowest package was 2 LPA. Recruiting companies were Tata and Capgemini, but only 40% of students secured placements. Roles offered were data analysis and data entry. Mostly, we work on ourselves to secure an internship and the college takes credit for them. If we are not much of a good student, they completely ignore us.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi is available. There are only a minimum amount of labs. Classrooms are not bad. Labs are built above the administrative building and going there feels kind of off. There are frequent power cuts and no internet provided. Hostel food is good. There are no medical facilities, and they do not encourage sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good but not management are not good .

content.Placements: The companies that visit primarily come from sectors like IT finance and manufacturing offering roles that cater to a broad range of students Skills and interests. While most students receive average starting packages a few high paying roles are offered each year to top-performing candidates.
content.Infrastructure: The library is well stocked with both physical and digital resources and it offers a quiet space for studying. Wi-Fi is available across campus, though connectivity can be consistent at times. Hostel rooms are modestly furnished and clean, though space can feel limited, and mess food could offer more variety.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Awesome and it's feels good in college .

content.Placements: The companies that visit primarily come from sectors like IT finance and manufacturing offering roles that cater to a broad range of students Skills and interests. content.Infrastructure: The library is well stocked with both physical and digital resources, and it offers a quiet space for studying. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you join my college, it will be good for your future .

content.Placements: 50% placed 12 LPA the highest package, 6 LPA the average package, 4 LPA the lowest package. Companies like Teach Mahendra and others came to interview at my college. 70% of students got internships from our course. CSC and ECE are the courses offered.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities; the infrastructure is developing nowadays in the college, and even in the hostel, there is no Wi-Fi in the classroom and the hostel. The library is good with more than ten thousand books. The hostel is well-maintained. Quality of food is better. Better maintenance of the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college vibes are good and peaceful.

content.Placements: Our college, the package of courses offered is in the range of 35k to 50k for freshers. Companies that come to our college are Wipro, Tata, Infosys, etc. Roles that we get on campus are freshers employees and manager level also getting. In my college to improve the skills.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi is available comfortably anywhere, and classrooms are also in good condition. The library is also good. In our college, a playground is available, and the food is very tasty. In my college hostel, snacks are also provided in the evening. Only in my hostel, good drinking water is provided, along with a good warden and gym equipment, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sri Venkateswara Institute of Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sri Venkateswara Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

reviews_list.review_title: Educational excellence and benefits.

review_content.Placements: Our college provided the best placement opportunities and highest packages with 60 percent of our batch getting placed in companies like Wipro, Accenture, Qualcomm and others. The college administration was very supportive and provided many opportunities for students to succeed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides a lot of facilities, including a gym, library, cafe and central canteen. The hostel rooms are clean and safe and the meals are of good quality and quantity.
review_content.Faculty: Each year consists of two semesters, and each semester consists of two internal tests, assignments, a project and a viva. The semesters are very tough but our lecturers and their helpful notes helped us secure a good percentage.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and value for money.

review_content.Placements: Due to lockdown, there are fewer placements. Value for money. A middle-class student can survive easily in this college. It is the cheap and best college. It is a friendly environment and ragging-free campus. Our principal is kind-hearted and more interactive with students. Bus services are provided for free.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Medical facilities, sick room, sports are not in our college. Mess food is not good and the campus location is far from roads. The college provides a good environment for studying and the labs are well-developed. The classrooms are non-air-conditioned. The college has to improve good quality of education.

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of an ECE engineer?
overview_faqs.answer: The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

highlights.summary: Institute of Engineering and Technology, University of Calicut is located in Malappuram, Kerala. The institute offers course like B.E. / B.Tech. This course is offered in Full Time mode. A total of 7 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Engineering. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My college is an average below college.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students got internships in Sutherland, Wipro, and TCS. A couple of students are in various companies. Top roles offered in my course are Data Analyst, Cybersecurity, Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, Full Stack Developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college does not have big facilities, 4 floors including classrooms and labs. Every department has Wi-Fi, every class has fans and lights, drinking water. Every floor has both ladies' and gents' bathrooms. Does not have a playing ground. And have outside labs for Civil, Physics, Chemistry, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college and campus life average faculty placement opportunities need to improve that is all.

review_content.Placements: In most courses the placement is average but around 30 to 40 percent of students from CSE and related branches get placed. Printing Technology department has 100 percent placement which is the strongest in the college. The highest package goes around 6 to 7LPA the average package offered is 3 to 4LPA and the lowest package offered is around 2.5LPA mostly depending on the students skill. Companies like TCS Infosys Wipro and Tech Mahindra visit the campus. Printing Tech many core companies also offer placements. Internships are not very common on campus for all branches. CSE the common roles are Software Developer QA Engineer and Support roles.

overview_faqs.question: Is Srinivas Group of Colleges a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Srinivas Group of Colleges is a reputed institute for MSW, BBA, BCA, B.Tech, BDS, Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, MDS, B.Sc., D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Humanities & Social Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Srinivas Group of Colleges has a review rating of 3.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 2.9 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 2.6 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Srinivas Group of Colleges a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Srinivas Group of Colleges is a good college.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 7 LPA. They also provide placement training processes from the first year.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are well-maintained. Laboratories are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel. Our campus is always kept clean. Pure vegetarian food items are available.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified. They always help students with academic-related problems. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry. They also provide certificates to students. Semester exams are moderate.

review_summary.college_name: Srinivas Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college is good but has high fees.

content.Placements: This college provides decent placement. Around 50% of students get placed. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is around 3.6 LPA. Infosys, TCS, Robosoft, and Juego are the companies that visit for placement. 20% of students got internships in companies like Novigo and EGDK.
content.Infrastructure: Here, all facilities are decent. The labs are decent, and Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are good. The hostel is present, but the mess food is not good. Sports facilities are decent. The library and labs still need improvement. The hostels are good, but Wi-Fi is slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, but it's left to you what to choose.

content.Placements: I am from the 2026 batch, studying a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science. 80% of students are placed in our college. The highest package given is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The companies that visit are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Elsevier. About 75% of students got internships. The roles offered are software developer, system engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is there in labs and also in the hostel mess. Classrooms are also good. Hostel rooms are good, but sometimes the water is dirty. Food is just okay, only veg, no non-veg is provided. There is no lift in the hostel, so if you are staying on the 5th floor, it will be difficult to walk daily. Warden also keeps changing, new wardens come, but all are good. Cleaning is done every two days.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is an extremely beautiful and good college.

content.Placements: 86% of students got internships. The top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, Wipro, and Microsoft. The highest salary package is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 3 LPA. The top roles offered are web developer and software developer. Around 70% of students got internships in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provides a hostel facility for both boys and girls. There are bedrooms with attached bathrooms. The hotel food is good, with homemade food. The canteen is also available. The college infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are also good. The library is available in the college. It is Wi-Fi enabled.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college and you will get very good faculty members and facilities.

content.Placements: Marine engineering is one of the best courses compared to others, and in Karnataka, there is only one BE marine engineering college, which is Srinivas Institute of Technology Mangaluru. In this course, you can earn more money than in other courses, but all you need to do is work hard.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, they conduct labs based on the machines used in ships and other machinery systems. We have a very good library, and our college campus provides free Wi-Fi. The college canteen food is much better compared to outside food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I have mentioned the college infrastructure and other details above. Please summarize that.

content.Placements: My course is Electronics and Communication Engineering. It is good because we can go to software and hardware companies, which will come to select for placements. The placement is not too bad, it is good, it offers average packages, which is good. There are good recruiting companies for our branch, like SolarEdge, Sion Semiconductors, SunRay, SmartED, etc. The internship is good. The facilities of the internship will be provided by the college to the students. You know that ECE students will play a very important role, so it has scope in AI and CS.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good but has high fees.
reviews.review_text: Here, all facilities are decent. The labs are decent, and Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are good. The hostel is present, but the mess food is not good. Sports facilities are decent. The library and labs still need improvement. The hostels are good, but Wi-Fi is slow.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 8 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but it's left to you what to choose.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is there in labs and also in the hostel mess. Classrooms are also good. Hostel rooms are good, but sometimes the water is dirty. Food is just okay, only veg, no non-veg is provided. There is no lift in the hostel, so if you are staying on the 5th floor, it will be difficult to walk daily. Warden also keeps changing, new wardens come, but all are good. Cleaning is done every two days.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an extremely beautiful and good college.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides a hostel facility for both boys and girls. There are bedrooms with attached bathrooms. The hotel food is good, with homemade food. The canteen is also available. The college infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are also good. The library is available in the college. It is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 15 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very nice college and you will get very good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they conduct labs based on the machines used in ships and other machinery systems. We have a very good library, and our college campus provides free Wi-Fi. The college canteen food is much better compared to outside food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 6 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I have mentioned the college infrastructure and other details above. Please summarize that.
reviews.review_text: The subject lab facilities are also good, classrooms are neat and clean, and no negative comments on that. The library will help us during exam time, which is very helpful to the students, and it is very good. Our SIT College provides good hostel facilities, which is more important for students to stay. Coming to the hostel, it is neat and clean. The food quality is not too bad in the hostel. We can get the medical facilities nearby.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good campus for students who are looking for a bright future. Placements are good.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are often good with a single chair per student. College Wi-Fi is within a limit of 100 Mbps. Computer labs are well-maintained with AC and also have a good Wi-Fi connection. Library is filled with all books related to daily life and course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 6 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculties are good at our college. Placement opportunities are average compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Library resources: The SRT library is well-equipped with a vast collection of books, general e-resources, and digital databases, providing a conducive environment for research and study crossroads at SITR designed to enhance the learning experience. Suturing modern amenities such as projectors at smart boards.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 14 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Shrinivas Institute of Technology in B.E. Computer Science and Engineering admission in 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure quality in this college is very good and uses high-quality materials. The college provides many facilities like fast Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, a library, drinking water, a hostel, etc. Facilities are available. The canteen food is very neat and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 4 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience of our SIT college .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well constructed. There most of the buildings are looking beautiful and attractive. All lab classes have good equipment. They're having free Wi-Fi for the requirement of students. The hostel is decent, and the food is acceptable. Medical and sports facilities were well provided at our time. I love it here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 23 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Innovation Hub: Unravelling the wonders of Srinivas Institute of Technology .
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi in the library. The labs are well-equipped. Classroom is also good, it has a projector, blackboard, and seats are arranged in a form of steps. Hostel is also good. The hostel has a spectacular view at the back. The hostel has a strict warden and security.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 20 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College is decent, placement-wise it lacks. Labs and other facilities are good on point.
reviews.review_text: Labs have decent Wi-Fi, classrooms are good. The mess is not good, sports facilities are decent. The library still needs improvement. Labs also can be improved. The hostel is not good, the mess is fine. The Wi-Fi is slow, not the fastest. They would force you to register for a certification course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 7 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with good placement facilities available.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure and facilities are available, including Wi-Fi with unlimited access, labs with advanced equipment, and separate departments and classrooms. Hostel facilities are also good, and the food quality is acceptable. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted regularly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 20 Apr 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best college, 100% satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: College architecture is good; its campus and buildings are attractive. But the lecture schedule is hectic; we have back-to-back lectures without breaks. Wi-Fi, good labs, and a library are the basic facilities available at the college. The college hostel is good; we have a butterfly garden on campus. In the hostel mess, the food is average in quality and taste. The canteen's seating arrangement is good, and they offer good-quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 22 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Events and fests happen in the college. A lot of enjoyment and memories are made, and parallelly we go with proper studies and daily practice the subjects. Mess food is not bad; we adjust to the food. Transportation is easy from the campus. Games are much more played in the college house only.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 17 Feb 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is a brand of excellence.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is better than our college surroundings and the classroom, library, and labs are also very neatly located in our college hostel. Facilities are also available in our hostel at any time. The canteen also has very good sports hours. We are enjoying a lot in our college.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Rathinam College of Arts and Science (RCAS) powered by Sunstone are BBA, BCA and MBA. RCAS powered by Sunstone offers BBA in multiple streams, namely Operations, Finance, Marketing, Digital Marketing, Retail Management, Design Thinking and Entrepreneurship, and more. The BCA programme is a three year full-time programme, whereas, the MBA programme is a two-year programme offered across various streams such as Marketing Management, Finance, Operations Management, IT, Analytics & Research, Sales Management, Digital Marketing and Banking, among others. Candidates can check the Rathinam College of Arts and Science (RCAS) powered by Sunstone popular programmes details in this space:

placements.overview:
RCAS powered by Sunstone placements 2025 statistics are out. As per the latest placement report, RCAS powered by Sunstone hosted a panel of over 1,200 recruiters during the 2025 placements. More than 150 job profiles were offered to students. The highest package offered during the college's placements for 2025 was INR 26 LPA, and the average package stood at INR 4.60 LPA. The top recruiters at RCAS Powered by Sunstone include Nestle. Amul, PayTM, Axis Bank, HDFC Life, Zomato, Wipro, etc.

RCAS Powered by Sunstone placement team keeps a track of the dynamic changes taking place across the globe to ensure success with Sunstone’s placement-centric sessions, such as comprehensive interview preparation. The course curriculum of courses such as MBA, BBA, BCA, and BTech includes an 8-month internship project that helps various course students learn the key concepts with a practical approach. admission_process.title: RCAS powered by Sunstone Admission process 2025

paragraphs: RCAS powered by Sunstone admissionis entrance-based. The college offers admission to students passing theSunstone Screening,which includes aptitude test and personal interview round.RCAS powered by Sunstone, offers courses at UG and PG levels in Management and Computer Application streams. The college is affiliated toBharthiar University. RCAS powered by Sunstone's popular programs, which are MBA, BBA, and BCA.Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

RCAS powered by Sunstone offers courses in affiliation withBharathiar University. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below areRCAS powered by sunstone coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduation from a recognised university with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Sunstone Screening (Test + Interview)
Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board of education with at least 50% aggregate

Download:RCAS powered by Sunstone Brochure 2025

RCAS powered by Sunstone admissionto courses is open for the academic year 2025. Candidates seeking admission are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and then follow the steps mentioned below:
Step 1: RCAS powered by Sunstone Application process 2025
Interested candidates are required to visit the official website ofSunstoneto apply for their desired course. Candidates need to provide the course preference when filling out the form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The selection to RCAS powered by Sunstone courses is based on Sunstone Screening test (Test and interview). Candidates who perform well in the aptitude test are shortlisted for the personal interview round.
Step 3: Document verification
After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to present the original copies of the documents uploaded during the application process.
Step 4: Seat Booking
Candidates shortlisted during the selection rounds need to pay theRCAS powered by Sunstone feeto secure their seats.

faqs.question: Does RCAS powered by Sunstone take admission on the basis of Class 12 marks?
faqs.answer: RCAS powered by Sunstone considers Class 12 scores for admission to UG courses i.e. BBA and BCA. However, mere fulfiling the eligibility requirements does not guarantee admission. Aspirants also need to participate in Sunstone Screening for admission. Aspirants need to pass SAT or Sunstone Admission Test followed by an interview for final selection.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in RCAS powered by Sunstone?
faqs.answer: Candidates first need to apply at Sunstone for the preferred course. RCAS powered by Sunstone offers admission to UG and PG courses based on Sunstone Screening. Under the screening process, aspirants are required to pass an aptitude test and a personal interview round. Hence, direct admission is usually not offered at the institute.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to RCAS powered by Sunstone?
faqs.answer: RCAS powered by Sunstone offers admission to courses based on Sunstone Screening. The screening includes an aptitude test and an interview round. Aspirants must qualify both the rounds for admission. Aspirants who are selected receive an admission offer. Shortlisted aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seats.

placement_report.college_name: RCAS powered by Sunstone Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: RCAS Powered by Sunstone Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the University hosted a panel of over 1,200 recruiters during the 2025 placements. More than 150 job profiles were offered. The highest package offered during RCAS Powered by Sunstone placements 2025 was INR 26 LPA , and the average package stood at INR 4.60 LPA .

The placement team of RCAS Powered by Sunstone keeps track of the dynamic changes taking place across the globe to ensure success with Sunstone’s placement-centric sessions, such as comprehensive interview preparation. The course curriculum of courses like MBA , BBA , BCA , and BTech includes an 8-month internship project that helps students learn the key concepts with a practical approach. Alongside this, 100% of scholarship opportunities are offered to the students. The ROI recorded was 63% higher.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) offers students access to 200+ assured placement opportunities, or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements don’t meet the commitment. To be eligible for POP, students must maintain a minimum average attendance of 70% across all credit and non-credit classes in every semester. They are also required to clear all examinations with a minimum score of 80% or equivalent CGPA, and must not have any backlogs. In addition, students must ensure that all fee payments are made as per the timeline outlined in the offer letter. Lastly, students must strictly adhere to the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program

highlights.summary: The HSTES 2026 counselling registration process for Guru Nanak Institute of Technology admission to the BTech course is expected to begin in June 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The college is the best, and there is nothing more to improve.

review_content.Placements: All students are placed in this course. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest is 10 LPA, and the average is 15 LPA. Mostly top recruiting companies visit this university, and almost all students get placed. Top roles are offered by the university.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for this course and department are very good. All rooms are air-conditioned, and the auditoriums are also well equipped. Labs are excellent, and the hostel has good quality facilities with well-allocated rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I recommend students to visit this college.

review_content.Placements: Our batch consists of 10 students where as previous batches had more than 30 students. Every student gets placed in a top company. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA, the average salary package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA, and the highest salary package is 27 LPA. The roles offered are software engineer, frontend engineer, and full-stack developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are above average. Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and a big library are available for students. The quality of the labs is average but the computers are of very poor quality. The quality of food served is very good in the hostel but average in the canteen. Medical facilities are available. Our college has very good environment.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is the best, and there is nothing more to improve.

content.Placements: All students are placed in this course. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest is 10 LPA, and the average is 15 LPA. Mostly top recruiting companies visit this university, and almost all students get placed. Top roles are offered by the university.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for this course and department are very good. All rooms are air-conditioned, and the auditoriums are also well equipped. Labs are excellent, and the hostel has good quality facilities with well-allocated rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I recommend students to visit this college.

content.Placements: Our batch consists of 10 students where as previous batches had more than 30 students. Every student gets placed in a top company. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA, the average salary package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA, and the highest salary package is 27 LPA. The roles offered are software engineer, frontend engineer, and full-stack developer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are above average. Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and a big library are available for students. The quality of the labs is average but the computers are of very poor quality. The quality of food served is very good in the hostel but average in the canteen. Medical facilities are available. Our college has very good environment.

description: The Guru Nanak Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Guru Nanak Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 266065 and 619583 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Electronics and Communic

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 266065 for the general AI quota.
On the contrary, the least competitive specialisation for admission in 2024 was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with closing cutoff rank of .

Guru Nanak Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores for admission to the BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table below to view the important JEE Main 2025 dates to be eligible for BTech admission at Guru Nanak Institute of Technology.

Guru Nanak Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Guru Nanak Institute of Technology.

Candidates can find the closing ranks for the Guru Nanak Institute of Technology released based on HSTES in the table below. The closing ranks for the General AI category candidates were closed between 266065 and 619583.
The most stringent cutoff was for admission to B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with the last round closing rank of for the General AI quota.

highlights.summary:
The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for JCET - Jaya College of Engineering and Technology admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    JCET - Jaya College of Engineering and Technology provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does JCET - Jaya College of Engineering and Technology offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Really satisfied with the course and especially faculty, good job offers in 2020.

review_content.Placements: First of all, I like to answer the question that what percent of students were got a job offer (ready to join). Here 80% of the students will get the job offer they can be placed in or not, that's student wish. Here both who have arrears and who got the all-clear will get the job offer. That's appreciative. I got a job offer in a tech company "Knackforge" with 3.5LPA. Due to some personal reasons, I didn't join. Honestly saying, there no top companies that have come for the campus. Some growing companies will come with good package and workspace. Roles offered for the course (as by I seen for our batch in campus) are Software Developer, L1 Engineer, L2 Engineer, Tester.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for students who want to involve in activities and educational activities.

review_content.Placements: I am from 2018 passed out batch. There are about 80 students in our batch. A total of 90% of the students have passed out. Top recruiting companies like TCS, CTS, etc., visit our college for placements. About 60% of the students got an internship in 3 top companies. I was sincerely involved in activities like symposium and a national conference.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure, ground, library and Wi-Fi facility with 32 Mbps internet connection. The hostel facility is good for both boys and girls separately. Quality of the food served is good. Our college provides 24x7 hospital, doctor and first-aid facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college management is very poor and they did not give importance to faculty.

content.Placements: They did not give any placements and placement training. The Jaya Engineering College will be doing the placements our college students will participate in the placement interviews. Faculty members are not experienced so they did not give importance to placements they only gave importance to the syllabus.
content.Infrastructure: We will talk about the hostel it will be good but the mess and the food in the mess were the worst. It was cooked by North Indians and it was tasteless and flavorless. Then sports activities are not conducted but they have a good cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Really satisfied with the course and especially faculty, good job offers in 2020.

content.Placements: First of all, I like to answer the question that what percent of students were got a job offer (ready to join). Here 80% of the students will get the job offer they can be placed in or not, that's student wish. Here both who have arrears and who got the all-clear will get the job offer. That's appreciative. I got a job offer in a tech company "Knackforge" with 3.5LPA. Due to some personal reasons, I didn't join. Honestly saying, there no top companies that have come for the campus. Some growing companies will come with good package and workspace. Roles offered for the course (as by I seen for our batch in campus) are Software Developer, L1 Engineer, L2 Engineer, Tester.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for students who want to involve in activities and educational activities.

content.Placements: I am from 2018 passed out batch. There are about 80 students in our batch. A total of 90% of the students have passed out. Top recruiting companies like TCS, CTS, etc., visit our college for placements. About 60% of the students got an internship in 3 top companies. I was sincerely involved in activities like symposium and a national conference.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure, ground, library and Wi-Fi facility with 32 Mbps internet connection. The hostel facility is good for both boys and girls separately. Quality of the food served is good. Our college provides 24x7 hospital, doctor and first-aid facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied only with the faculty on the campus.

content.Placements: All the placements on the campus are good, but the visiting companies are not much good. In our college, the mechanical department batches are started on 2011, and at that time, one small company came for an interview. Next 2016 batch has got two interviews from Hani Solution(Manpower Supplier). The college is not good in placements.
content.Infrastructure: When we entered in this college, we can feel that this is like an agricultural college because all the surrounding of this college is full of grass, so it slightly looks greenish. Here, there is one main block for PG students, one block for UG students, and another one block for a lab. The entrance of the college is not good, but inside, it will be awesome.

college_info.college_name: Institute of Chemical Technology, Marathwada Campus: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Institute of Chemical Technology, Marathwada Campus:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Institute of Chemical Technology, Marathwada Campus offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Institute of Chemical Technology, Marathwada Campus offers M.E./M.Tech. The fees for Institute of Chemical Technology, Marathwada Campus courses range between INR 1,45,000 to 4,50,500.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students have been placed in various companies. To date, the highest salary package offered is 21 lakhs, while the lowest is 6 lakhs. The top recruiting companies include Whole Truth Foods, Keva Flavor and Foods, Henkel, and BARC. Nearly every batch has secured placements with these companies. For internships, around 3 to 4 students are typically selected for top roles, including production manager, research and development positions, and chemical engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has 24/7 Wi-Fi, well-established labs, and classrooms have a mike, project speakers, and a blackboard with each AC. The mess and canteen have good food the mess is cooperative. The hostel also has Wi-Fi 24/7, and a cleaning lady is there washing machine good hostel. We also have sports events teach events, and cultural events.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering (Lipid Engineering) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college for fortunate students.

review_content.Placements: In the last batch, I saw that 38 out of 55 students were placed, and 8 students received the opportunity to pursue a PhD in chemical engineering through government fellowships in different countries. The highest package was about 12 LPA, and the lowest was 4.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very poor because the actual campus of ICT Jalna college is under construction, so, at the moment, the college infrastructure is not that good and is rental. Although it's good if you're more focused on education instead of infrastructure. Regarding labs and classrooms, they are very good; all labs are equipped, and all the instruments are new and good. Classrooms are also good, with ACs and digital classroom logistics.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Food Engineering and Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for M. Tech in Mumbai.

review_content.Placements: Before students were about to give their final exams, there were placement interviews held over one or two months. The institute placement wing listed the dates for the placement interviews. As there were appropriate chances of jobs, students were able to pass the interview and the written aptitude tests due to their academic knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had four hostels available. If students were 80 kilometers away from college, and if students were outside of Mumbai, then they got hostel accommodation. Almost every student gets a desk, bed, and locker. If a student wanted to rent one of them, it would be very expensive because the college was in New Mumbai. The meal quality in college was very good. The menu had not yet been decided. They provided non-vegetarian food twice a week in sufficient quantities. If a student wants an extra meal, such as an egg or a banana for breakfast, they must pay.

review_summary.college_name: Marathwada Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering (Food Engineering and Technology) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Institute of Chemical Technology, Marathwada Campus.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students have been placed in various companies. To date, the highest salary package offered is 21 lakhs, while the lowest is 6 lakhs. The top recruiting companies include Whole Truth Foods, Keva Flavor and Foods, Henkel, and BARC. Nearly every batch has secured placements with these companies. For internships, around 3 to 4 students are typically selected for top roles, including production manager, research and development positions, and chemical engineers.
content.Infrastructure: The college has 24/7 Wi-Fi, well-established labs, and classrooms have a mike, project speakers, and a blackboard with each AC. The mess and canteen have good food the mess is cooperative. The hostel also has Wi-Fi 24/7, and a cleaning lady is there washing machine good hostel. We also have sports events teach events, and cultural events.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering (Lipid Engineering) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college for fortunate students.

content.Placements: In the last batch, I saw that 38 out of 55 students were placed, and 8 students received the opportunity to pursue a PhD in chemical engineering through government fellowships in different countries. The highest package was about 12 LPA, and the lowest was 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very poor because the actual campus of ICT Jalna college is under construction, so, at the moment, the college infrastructure is not that good and is rental. Although it's good if you're more focused on education instead of infrastructure. Regarding labs and classrooms, they are very good; all labs are equipped, and all the instruments are new and good. Classrooms are also good, with ACs and digital classroom logistics.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Food Engineering and Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for M. Tech in Mumbai.

content.Placements: Before students were about to give their final exams, there were placement interviews held over one or two months. The institute placement wing listed the dates for the placement interviews. As there were appropriate chances of jobs, students were able to pass the interview and the written aptitude tests due to their academic knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had four hostels available. If students were 80 kilometers away from college, and if students were outside of Mumbai, then they got hostel accommodation. Almost every student gets a desk, bed, and locker. If a student wanted to rent one of them, it would be very expensive because the college was in New Mumbai. The meal quality in college was very good. The menu had not yet been decided. They provided non-vegetarian food twice a week in sufficient quantities. If a student wants an extra meal, such as an egg or a banana for breakfast, they must pay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is not preferable for pursuing engineering studies.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are most likely for diploma students, but there are no placements for engineering students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not bad. It is a single blocked college with a canteen. Sports and games are held occasionally. This college provides a good transportation facility in the day time. It has good labs and equipment, but there is no good administration.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members of our college are good and friendly. They have good knowledge, but teaching quality is low as compared to other colleges. The course curriculum is relevant, but they don't have faculty members to teach the curriculum. They don't make students industry-ready. Faculty members are good for diploma students but not for engineering students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty, labs and environment, but there are no placements.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placements even my seniors also faced this issues regarding the placement. From the establishment of this college, they didn't place a single student. There is no placement cell in the college. We raised this issue many times, but there is no reply.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are a good environment, surroundings and have a large ground. The classrooms on the campus are good. The library is big and contains all types of books related to the subjects. The labs have good equipment, and there is a lot to learn. A small canteen is available, but not worthy.

Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. overview_faqs.question: Can DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) is a reputed institute for MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) has a review rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 2 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I won't recommend the students due to placement issues.

content.Placements: I am an ECE student. Coming to the placements, I saw only one placement at this college. The highest salary package offered was 2 LPA. In that year, no other in that campus placement and 20 members were qualified.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, library, playground, and cameras were there on each floor. Hostel facilities were available only for boys, not for girls. Canteen was also okay but sometimes there was no food in canteen. Hostel was very clean and they maintained neatness. Playground was very nice to play sports. Labs were available.
content.Faculty: Teachers were qualified, very helpful, and knowledgeable. Semester exams were good but sometimes exams were held in Gudivada College. Pass percentage was 8 to 9 CGPA. Faculty members were good. If we had any doubt then they were ready to answer our questions. The principal was strict.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good college. It has good environment .

content.Placements: Almost 90% seats are filled. Highest package in placement is 5 lakg per annum and lowest is 1.5 lakh per annum. And 80 to 70% are passed. And the companies are bhatath benze, wipro, maruthi suzuki, honda, and other computer based worked companies who offered in our college campus.
content.Infrastructure: Good in labs and Wi-Fi facilities and has big ground and is near to all medical and hospitals and canteen is good and the college is big and hostel facilities and clean and the maintenance is good and the college has big ground and the surrounding has trees .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college is not preferable for pursuing engineering studies.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are most likely for diploma students, but there are no placements for engineering students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not bad. It is a single blocked college with a canteen. Sports and games are held occasionally. This college provides a good transportation facility in the day time. It has good labs and equipment, but there is no good administration.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of our college are good and friendly. They have good knowledge, but teaching quality is low as compared to other colleges. The course curriculum is relevant, but they don't have faculty members to teach the curriculum. They don't make students industry-ready. Faculty members are good for diploma students but not for engineering students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty, labs and environment, but there are no placements.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placements even my seniors also faced this issues regarding the placement. From the establishment of this college, they didn't place a single student. There is no placement cell in the college. We raised this issue many times, but there is no reply.
content.Infrastructure: There are a good environment, surroundings and have a large ground. The classrooms on the campus are good. The library is big and contains all types of books related to the subjects. The labs have good equipment, and there is a lot to learn. A small canteen is available, but not worthy.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014

content.Other: DJRIET is near to Gannavaram airport, Vijayawada. It was established in 2008. I did B.Tech in CSE 2010-2014, my college have a good environment, and faculty are very good and they interact freely with students. I am happy to say that DJR Group is the best Institution.

admission_process.title: DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) admissions2025 is merit-based. To apply for any of the courses at the university, students need to meet the admission criteria for the same. The university offers an extensive range of courses across multiple disciplines, including Engineering and Business and Management Studies, and more. AtDJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET), candidates are selected based on their academic merit. The application forms are available online at the official website of the university. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

The most popularDJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) coursesis B.E. / B.Tech. Read the following article to get the latest admission-related information for DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET).

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
DJR Institute of Engineering and Technology (DJRIET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2025, really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Among five students, only one gets placed in this college. Companies that come for recruitment are not top-tier. Most of them are startup companies or companies from Chennai. They recruit students for small positions and offer a salary of around Rs. 20,000. The highest package is 7 LPA, while the lowest is 1.7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: CJIT College provides transport facilities for students and staff across all surrounding areas of Hanmakonda and Jangaon. The library offers reference services to students and staff, with a collection of 2,600 volumes of reference books. It also provides a Current Awareness Service. However, the food in the hostel is not good, and bathrooms are not clean at all. The hostel bathrooms are in very poor condition, similar to those in a bus stand. Facilities for our course, especially AIML, are not well-developed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for middle-class students with the best teachers and a good environment.

content.Placements: 40-50% of students get placed every year. The average package is 3.5 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, and Intel visit the college for placements. Major roles of software engineering and marketing analyser are offered in our computer science and engineering course.
content.Infrastructure: The best quality facilities are provided by our management. There is a good Wi-Fi connection. There is a good environment in labs and classrooms. There is a peaceful environment in the library. It has a clean and hygienic mess, which serves nice food. Medical facilities are available. There is a big ground for sports and games.

Teachers encourage the students to develop their skills.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are available, and the BC hostel is also available. The college infrastructure is very good, and all labs are available for the mechanical branch. Meanwhile, hostel food is very tasty and hygienic. The canteen and mess are available in the college, and sports and games are also present.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied because of no placements.

content.Placements: Placements were not provided in our college for diploma students. It was not a good college for placements. Industrial training was provided in the final semester of the course where our college management will consult some private organisations and charge some amount from students.

admission_process.title: Christhu Jyothi Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Christhu Jyothi Institute of Technology and Science admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 17 programmes.Christhu Jyothi Institute of Technology and Scienceoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. Christhu Jyothi Institute of Technology and Science admission is done based on scores of exams like GATE, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET.
