reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2025, really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: CJIT College provides transport facilities for students and staff across all surrounding areas of Hanmakonda and Jangaon. The library offers reference services to students and staff, with a collection of 2,600 volumes of reference books. It also provides a Current Awareness Service. However, the food in the hostel is not good, and bathrooms are not clean at all. The hostel bathrooms are in very poor condition, similar to those in a bus stand. Facilities for our course, especially AIML, are not w...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for middle-class students with the best teachers and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: The best quality facilities are provided by our management. There is a good Wi-Fi connection. There is a good environment in labs and classrooms. There is a peaceful environment in the library. It has a clean and hygienic mess, which serves nice food. Medical facilities are available. There is a big ground for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for study.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available, and the BC hostel is also available. The college infrastructure is very good, and all labs are available for the mechanical branch. Meanwhile, hostel food is very tasty and hygienic. The canteen and mess are available in the college, and sports and games are also present.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only for faculty members. Laboratory is well-equipped. Classrooms are properly maintained. The library has many books. Hostel facilities are moderate. The food served in the hostel is good. Canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied because of no placements.
reviews.review_text: The environment of our college was good but water will not be available and the washrooms were not clean. Ground was available but students were not permitted to play games. The food served in the hostel was average. The infrastructure of the hostel was a bit average.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in the Jangoan district.
reviews.review_text: Our college has been established in a large area. Separate hostels were available for girls and boys. Our college provided many facilities like a huge playground, a well-established library, and laboratories. The campus has a Wi-Fi facility for students to get in-depth information about each subject.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus life is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good in this college. Laboratories were well-equipped. The food served in the hostel was average. The canteen served tasty food. Sports were also average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with students because it is close to Jangaon and Warangal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of labs and classrooms is good. Wi-Fi is not so good. Labs are equipped with good equipment and can work. Classrooms have projectors to learn digitally. The hostel is in front of our college at a little distance. Computer science students have access to good labs and infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Christhu Jyothi Institute of Technology and Science is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good labs and classrooms. We have Wi-Fi and air conditioning in labs with good and high-end equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for rural students to become engineers and the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: This college provides all facilities like a canteen, library, digital classrooms, well-experienced faculty members, peaceful campus environment. It also provides hostels for both boys and girls on the college premises, and a bus facility is also provided from hanmakonda.

reviews.review_heading: Good staff and got a nice placements for 2022 batch.
reviews.review_text:
The college environment, labs and classes are very good and hostel facilities are even finer than the other local hostel's library has more updated books and they make sure that every update is involved in the books.
Hostels do have Wi-Fi facilities for the students and also on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: There are satisfactory placements, good infrastructure and labs and experienced teachers.
reviews.review_text: There are labs with good equipment which works fine. There are tidy classrooms. There is also a central library which contains numerous books on the same subject. The hostel is fine, and the quality of food available in the mess is satisfactory. There is a spacious ground with courts for different sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was free. Laboratories were available. The library was also very useful, and it was capacity around 300 students. The hostel was also good, but food sometimes not good. Canteen was also available. Sports were also here to play with district level and the ground was enough for playing more games at a time.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because the college environment and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: In our college, facilities are very good like Wi-Fi is available. Labs are also well-maintained, and classrooms are also well-cleaned with a very good environment. The library is very big and full of books, and it is very useful for students. The hostel facility is available. Sports and games are conducted weekly once for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as teachers and placements are good, and infrastructure and facilities are the best.
reviews.review_text: Our college was established in 1998. Our college is very old, but technically it has the best Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, a huge seminar hall, a huge playground, different laboratories for different activities and experiments, and a big library with different types of books. The hostel was built with a difference of 2 years from the establishment of the college. It has good accommodation with the best food and the best medical facilities. Our canteen is also well-furnished, and the best food is s...

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) courses stands around INR 99,000 to 1,84,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) are Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET)?

faqs.answer: A:    Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma in streams such as Engineering, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET).

review_content.Placements: Our college acquires better placements. The highest package offered is approximately 4.5 lakhs per annum, and the lowest package is 2.6 LPA, for the previous batch. Some top companies have recruited the students by conducting a separate online exam via GATE exam, and the other companies like HCL, Tech Mahindra, Zenith solutions, etc., recruited the remaining students. Internships are offered in computer mechanism, artificial intelligence and some other courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything was clear and fantastic about infrastructure in our college. A good playground, well-equipped labs, etc., are available. A disciplined manner is followed in college. According to me, everything is perfect, but the mechanical branch has a lot of equipment than our branch. There is no hostel for boys, but only for girls. So, boys have to go for other hostels outside the college. That's why our accommodation facilities depend on the fee we pay. The girls' hostel has all the required facilities, and the security is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely not recommendable as the college is about to shut down.

review_content.Placements: Very few companies visited the college to offer placement. One can easily get such jobs on their own. So, the placement percentage in our college is nearly zero. The college is not highly reputed. Not even a single company visited the college to offer placements for civil engineering students. Some of the students from electrical and ECE branches got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. But, all the required facilities are available. Canteen, workshop, labs, etc., are available. A covered parking area is available. A garden is present on the campus. Every field has different labs accordingly. Classes are enough spacious for the students to study.

individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure of the college is good.

content.Placements: In our branch, the average package is 3.5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies give priority to our course. The roles offered to our course are software development engineer, testing developer, error corecter, hr, manager, team leader etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are available, with low version computers. Wi-Fi facility is low. Labs are good. Classrooms are neat and clean. Library contains all kind of books. Hostel has good water and food facility. Canteen food is nice. Medical facilities are available, whenever we need. Daily, we have sports and games.

reviews.review_text: Labs are available, with low version computers. Wi-Fi facility is low. Labs are good. Classrooms are neat and clean. Library contains all kind of books. Hostel has good water and food facility. Canteen food is nice. Medical facilities are available, whenever we need. Daily, we have sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you do not join the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide placements. They all are fake for popularity. None of the students come to college for placements, and they all come to do time pass.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Universal College of Engineering and Technology (UCET).
reviews.review_text: Everything was clear and fantastic about infrastructure in our college. A good playground, well-equipped labs, etc., are available. A disciplined manner is followed in college. According to me, everything is perfect, but the mechanical branch has a lot of equipment than our branch. There is no hostel for boys, but only for girls. So, boys have to go for other hostels outside the college. That's why our accommodation facilities depend on the fee we pay. The girls' hostel has all the required faci...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely not recommendable as the college is about to shut down.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. But, all the required facilities are available. Canteen, workshop, labs, etc., are available. A covered parking area is available. A garden is present on the campus. Every field has different labs accordingly. Classes are enough spacious for the students to study.

reviews.review_heading: No placement at all in year 2017 even GTU is thinking to remove College from next year admission lis
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good but the facility required at current position are not available labs like Android lab robotic lab are not available and canteen is third grade and the location is between the village and farming land so the infrastructure does't make so worth impact for student.

reviews.review_heading: The college activities are good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not good. The instruments in the labs are also not good. The medical facilities are not good. We need more facilities in medical. The campus is good but has some problem. We need a good coach for practice. Also, need sports kits for playing. Events are good, but not fully celebrated.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, an average experience because of not meeting up to my expectations being a student of CBSE.
reviews.review_text: When I joined, it was under construction. It was situated in the middle of fields, and the transportation connectivity was very poor. The classrooms and the canteen of the college are average. The library of the college is good. The college has 3 floors, good labs, own tier buses within the Ahmedabad and not for Gandhinagar for the students. The students have to travel on your own or fix your private transport for the college.

reviews.review_heading: Nowadays, due to disputes in higher authority, the college is in a very bad condition.
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facility and labs in the college. The classrooms are very simple. The library is available only for taking books and not for sitting. There are no medical facilities in the college. There is no sports ground in the college. The quality of the food in the canteen is very poor. The buildings in the college are small, but it is sufficient to study.

reviews.review_heading: Below average in almost every aspect.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was very poor. The classrooms were nice and the benches and chairs were of an average quality. The basic hygiene facilities like washrooms for boys and girls were very poor and the cleanliness of washrooms was the biggest issue. The cool drinking water facility was available for students.

It is a good college to study. Here, the environment is pleasant to learn and study since it is far from the city. Professors have good knowledge, so you can learn a lot of from them. The college facilities are good. It has a nice library with the availability of many books. The college also arranges annual festivals. It is a good college to study. reviews.review_heading: Overall good college to study.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good for college, only one block is there in which all the department so it is easy and convenient for all the visitors to visit here very easily. And moreover, the canteen is there and workshop for mechanical engineering is also there which is separated from the other blocks.
